title: Giant Squid in Ocean Depth Coloring Page
seoTitle: Giant Squid in Ocean Depth Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Print this detailed giant squid navigating through deep water columns. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The Giant Squid in Ocean Depth possesses three hearts and blue, copper-based blood, which is more efficient than iron-based blood in cold depths.
The Giant Squid in Ocean Depth swims using jet propulsion, forcing water out of a muscular siphon to shoot backwards through the sea.
